author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council
book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon XXIX.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A canon of the Synod of Carthage says that the holy mysteries of the altar are not to be performed but by men who are fasting, except on one day in the year on which the Supper of the Lord is celebrated.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: At that time, on account perhaps of certain occasions in those places useful to the Church, even the holy Fathers themselves made use of this dispensation.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: But since nothing leads us to abandon exact observance, we decree that the Apostolic and Patristic tradition shall be followed; and define that it is not right to break the fast on the fifth feria of the last week of Lent, and thus to do dishonour to the whole of Lent.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Some of the Fathers after they had supped on the day of the Divine Supper made the offering.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: However, it has seemed good to the synod that this should not be done, and that the fast should not be broken upon the fifth feria of the last week of Lent, and so the whole of Lent be dishonoured.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Zonaras remarks that the “Apostolic and Patristic tradition” is a reference to canon lxix. of the Apostolic Canons and to canon l. of Laodicea.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: See notes on this last canon.
